'''chaduku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaffery|chaffery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaffery|chaffery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chaduku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chædikith|chædikith]] || [[word:chædikij|chædikij]] || [[word:chædikish|chædikish]] || [[word:chædiki|chædiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chadudukuth|chadudukuth]] || [[word:chadudukuj|chadudukuj]] || [[word:chadudukush|chadudukush]] || [[word:chaduduku|chaduduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chadukuth|chadukuth]] || [[word:chadukuj|chadukuj]] || [[word:chadukush|chadukush]] || [[word:chaduku|chaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chadufkuth|chadufkuth]] || [[word:chadufkuj|chadufkuj]] || [[word:chadufkush|chadufkush]] || [[word:chadufkuf|chadufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chadukuthu|chadukuthu]] || [[word:chadukuju|chadukuju]] || [[word:chadukushu|chadukushu]] || [[word:chadukuku|chadukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chadukuth|chadukuth]] || [[word:chadukuj|chadukuj]] || [[word:chadukush|chadukush]] || [[word:chaduku|chaduku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chadukuthul|chadukuthul]] || [[word:chadukujul|chadukujul]] || [[word:chadukushul|chadukushul]] || [[word:chadukukul|chadukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chadukuthuthu|chadukuthuthu]] || [[word:chadukujuju|chadukujuju]] || [[word:chadukushushu|chadukushushu]] || [[word:chadukuku|chadukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chadukuthun|chadukuthun]] || [[word:chadukujun|chadukujun]] || [[word:chadukushun|chadukushun]] || [[word:chadukukun|chadukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chadukuthuoro|chadukuthuoro]] || [[word:chadukujuoro|chadukujuoro]] || [[word:chadukushuoro|chadukushuoro]] || [[word:chadukukuoro|chadukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
